info.title: BrowserStack Automate API
info.description: API for managing BrowserStack Automate resources including projects, builds, sessions, media files, and account settings.

get.description: Returns the current Automate plan details including parallel sessions and queued sessions.
Returns the list of available OS and browser combinations for Automate testing.
Returns a list of all projects in the account.
Returns details of a specific project including its builds.

parameters.name: projectId
parameters.description: The ID of the project.

put.description: Updates the name of a project.

parameters.name: projectId
parameters.description: The ID of the project.

delete.description: Deletes a project and all its builds and sessions.

parameters.name: projectId
parameters.description: The ID of the project.

get.description: Returns the status badge key for the specified project.

parameters.name: projectId
parameters.description: The ID of the project.

get.description: Returns a list of recent builds with optional filtering by status and limit.

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Number of builds to return.

parameters.name: offset
parameters.description: Offset for pagination.

parameters.name: status
parameters.description: Filter by build status (running, done, failed).

delete.description: Deletes multiple builds specified by an array of build IDs in the request body.

get.description: Returns the details of a specific build.

parameters.name: buildId
parameters.description: The hashed ID of the build.

put.description: Updates the name of a build.

parameters.name: buildId
parameters.description: The hashed ID of the build.

delete.description: Deletes a build and all its sessions.

parameters.name: buildId
parameters.description: The hashed ID of the build.

post.description: Appends terminal logs to the specified build.

parameters.name: buildId
parameters.description: The hashed ID of the build.

put.description: Updates the tags associated with a build.

parameters.name: buildId
parameters.description: The hashed ID of the build.

get.description: Returns a list of sessions for the specified build.

parameters.name: buildId
parameters.description: The hashed ID of the build.

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Number of sessions to return.

parameters.name: offset
parameters.description: Offset for pagination.

parameters.name: status
parameters.description: Filter by session status (running, done, failed).

get.description: Returns the details of a specific session.

parameters.name: sessionId
parameters.description: The hashed ID of the session.

put.description: Updates the name or status of a session.

parameters.name: sessionId
parameters.description: The hashed ID of the session.

parameters.name: sessionId
parameters.description: The hashed ID of the session.

delete.description: Deletes multiple sessions specified by an array of session IDs in the request body.

get.description: Returns the text logs for a specific session.

parameters.name: sessionId
parameters.description: The hashed ID of the session.

get.description: Returns the network logs in HAR format for a specific session.

parameters.name: sessionId
parameters.description: The hashed ID of the session.

200.description: Network logs retrieved successfully in HAR format.

get.description: Returns the browser console logs for a specific session.

parameters.name: sessionId
parameters.description: The hashed ID of the session.

get.description: Returns the Selenium logs for a specific session.

parameters.name: sessionId
parameters.description: The hashed ID of the session.

get.description: Returns the Appium logs for a specific session.

parameters.name: sessionId
parameters.description: The hashed ID of the session.

post.description: Appends terminal logs to the specified session.

parameters.name: sessionId
parameters.description: The hashed ID of the session.

put.description: Sets the status (passed/failed) and reason for a specific session.

parameters.name: sessionId
parameters.description: The hashed ID of the session.

put.description: Updates the name of a specific session.

parameters.name: sessionId
parameters.description: The hashed ID of the session.

get.description: Returns the profiling data for a specific session.

parameters.name: sessionId
parameters.description: The hashed ID of the session.

post.description: Uploads a media file (image, video, etc.) for use in Automate tests.

get.description: Returns a list of recently uploaded media files.

200.description: List of media files retrieved successfully.

delete.description: Deletes a previously uploaded media file.

parameters.name: mediaId
parameters.description: The ID of the media file to delete.

put.description: Resets the access key for the authenticated user and returns the new key.

basicAuth.description: HTTP Basic authentication using BrowserStack username and access key.

parallel_sessions_running.description: Number of parallel sessions currently running.

team_parallel_sessions_max_allowed.description: Maximum number of parallel sessions allowed for the team.

parallel_sessions_max_allowed.description: Maximum number of parallel sessions allowed.

queued_sessions_max_allowed.description: Maximum number of queued sessions allowed.

real_mobile.description: Whether the device is a real mobile device.

group_id.description: Group ID the project belongs to.

user_id.description: User ID who created the project.

created_at.description: Timestamp when the project was created.

updated_at.description: Timestamp when the project was last updated.

badge_key.description: Badge key for embedding the status badge.

build_ids.description: Array of build hashed IDs to delete.

tags.description: Array of tags to assign to the build.

browser_url.description: URL to view the session in BrowserStack dashboard.

public_url.description: Public URL for sharing the session.

video_url.description: URL to the session video recording.

session_ids.description: Array of session hashed IDs to delete.

NetworkLogs.description: Network logs in HAR (HTTP Archive) format.

items.description: Individual HAR entry representing a network request.

media_url.description: URL identifier of the uploaded media file.
URL identifier of the media file.

uploaded_at.description: Timestamp when the file was uploaded.
